languages.text: "Наши отношения далеки от родственных, но мы примем бой вместе".
"Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."
languages.original_text: "Наши отношения далеки от родственных, но мы примем бой вместе".

traits.locale_text: {nc|"It was an honour to meet you, Seberian."|"Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."}
{nc|"It was an honour to meet you, Seberian."|"Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."}
{nc|"It was an honour to meet you, Seberian."|"Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."}
{nc|"It was an honour to meet you, Seberian."|"Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."}

languages.text: "Wir sind zwar alles andere als eine Familie, werden aber im Kampf Seite an Seite stehen."
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: {nc|"Es war eine Ehre, Euch zu treffen, Seberian."|"Wir sind zwar alles andere als eine Familie, werden aber im Kampf Seite an Seite stehen."}

languages.text: « Nos liens sont bien loin de ceux qui unissent une vraie famille, mais nous combattrons ensemble. »
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: {nc|« C'était un honneur de vous rencontrer, Seberian. »|« Nos liens sont bien loin de ceux qui unissent une vraie famille, mais nous combattrons ensemble. »}

languages.text: «Nuestra relación dista mucho de ser familiar, pero estaremos juntos en combate».
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: {nc|«Ha sido un honor conocerle, Seberian».|«Nuestra relación dista mucho de ser familiar, pero estaremos juntos en combate».}

languages.text: "Bizimki ailevi bir ilişkiden çok uzak olsa da omuz omuza savaşacağız."
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: {nc|"Seni tanımaktan onur duydum Seberian."|"Bizimki ailevi bir ilişkiden çok uzak olsa da omuz omuza savaşacağız."}

languages.text: “我们之间的关系算不上亲近，但我会和你并肩作战。”
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: {nc|“很荣幸见到你，塞贝里安。”|“我们之间的关系算不上亲近，但我会和你并肩作战。”}

languages.text: 「我々は血縁関係に遠く及ばないが、戦場では共に立つ」
languages.original_text: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は血縁関係に遠く及ばないが、戦場では共に立つ」
